creator: andrej@ebert.su
text:
There are new patched releases for the 4.16,4.17 and 4.18 branches.

I updated the port to 4.16.11 and ran testport, seems ok for now.

I also updated 2 production samba DCs to 4.16.11 with this patch and so far everything seems to work, including domain logons for windows clients with KB5028166 installed.
